DEFAULT.$description: A default text color used for primary text content.

secondary.$description: Use for text with a secondary level of prominence.

disabled.$description: A disabled text color used for non-interactive text content.

DEFAULT.$description: A text color used for interactive link elements in their default resting state.

hover.$description: A text color used for interactive link elements when hovered.

active.$description: A text color used for interactive link elements when pressed or active.

DEFAULT.$description: A text color used for previously visited link elements in their default resting state.

hover.$description: A text color used for previously visited link elements when hovered.

active.$description: A text color used for previously visited link elements when pressed or active.

DEFAULT.$description: A text color for use on primary strong fill elements to ensure accessible contrast.

inverse.$description: A text color for use on primary strong fill elements in inverse contexts to ensure accessible contrast.

on-inverse.$description: A text color used for high contrast content on dark backgrounds, overlays, or inverse surfaces.

DEFAULT.$description: A primary text color used to communicate brand presence and highlight key content.

strong.$description: A primary text color used to communicate brand presence and highlight key content.

DEFAULT.$description: An accent text color used to highlight new features, announcements, or secondary branded content.

strong.$description: An accent text color used to highlight new features, announcements, or secondary branded content.

DEFAULT.$description: An informational text color used to highlight info states, messages, or emphasis content.

strong.$description: An informational text color used to highlight info states, messages, or emphasis content.

DEFAULT.$description: A danger text color used to highlight danger states, messages, or emphasis content.

strong.$description: A danger text color used to highlight danger states, messages, or emphasis content.

DEFAULT.$description: A warning text color used to highlight warning states, messages, or emphasis content.

strong.$description: A warning text color used to highlight warning states, messages, or emphasis content.

DEFAULT.$description: A success text color used to highlight success states, messages, or emphasis content.

strong.$description: A success text color used to highlight success states, messages, or emphasis content.
